## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and website directory project progress.](https://fathom.video/share/utkeqzs1s-xbXWNKzSmyraQvVTdvjN7y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic remains stagnant week-over-week, with slight shifts in page performance](https://fathom.video/share/utkeqzs1s-xbXWNKzSmyraQvVTdvjN7y?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [SEMrush shows recent increase in Webstacks' organic keyword rankings (50-60 new keywords in top 10)](https://fathom.video/share/utkeqzs1s-xbXWNKzSmyraQvVTdvjN7y?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

  - [Programmatic website directory project progressing, with focus on adding unique value beyond competitors](https://fathom.video/share/utkeqzs1s-xbXWNKzSmyraQvVTdvjN7y?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
